extension.name: Joomla! Audio Archive Package
extension.author: Frank Willeke
extension.license: GNU General Public License version 2 or later
extension.description: Audio Archive is a Joomla! 6 package for managing and publishing large searchable collections of audio clips. It installs the Audio Archive component for administrator upload, directory import, metadata, categories, tags, protected playback, filtering, clip detail pages and original-file downloads, plus the Audio Archive Smart Search plugin for indexing eligible clips in Joomla Finder. The package also includes one configurable Audio Archive site module with latest, random, clip-of-the-day, popularity and specific-clip selection modes. Processing-task plugins, preview generation and waveform support are planned for later development phases.
